I won't touch DictLoader/FunctionLoader/PackageLoader/PrefixLoader/ChoiceLoader or other FileSystemLoader internals. Please add your path_transform params at the end of each __init__ signature too, after any params I add to FileSystemLoader, to reduce signature conflicts. We'll each commit to our own branch and merge via git afterward, resolving any textual conflicts manually. Proceeding to implement now.
